entries.title: Overview of Solveyra's home
entries.subtitle: System, Planet
entries.body:
Solveyra is an aquatic nation on the planet Velundra, within the Varn star system.

Velundra is an ocean world, with it's mass being 40% water, it orbits a red dwarf with an orbital period of 30 days. Velundra's size is large, with it being 9 times the size of earth (See K2-18b for a more accurate description)

Varn is a red dwarf star with 5 orbiting bodies, Velundra, the only planet within it's habitable zone, Val-86, a gas giant, roughly the size of Jupiter, Nar-54 and Nar-55, 2 rocky moon planets orbiting close to Varn, and Gar-84, an ice planet furthest from Varn.

Velundra itself has 2 moons, Mar, and Var, these moons are rather large at twice the size of Earth's moon, although their effect on the planet is limited due to the lack of land masses on the surface.
